name: Anyline
description: Mobile OCR SDK for scanning IDs, meters, VINs, licenses, barcodes on-device.

seo.title: Anyline — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Anyline: Mobile OCR SDK for scanning IDs, meters, VINs, licenses, barcodes on-device.

when_to_use: Scanning driver licenses and IDs on mobile for KYC flows
Reading utility meter values via smartphone camera SDK
Extracting VINs from vehicles during field inspections
On-device barcode scanning without cloud round-trip latency

pros: Fully on-device scanning — no cloud needed
Specialized models for meters, VINs, IDs
cons: SDK licence fees per active user
Narrow scope vs generic OCR APIs
review.verdict: The right call for field-ops apps where privacy and offline scanning beat general OCR accuracy.
review.best_for: Utilities, logistics, and insurance apps scanning physical assets in the field
review.not_for: Server-side document processing or generic text extraction
